probeCatalog.label: Local contract smoke
probeCatalog.description: Checks one critical local journey before the tuple can close.

probeCatalog.label: Local parity refresh
probeCatalog.description: Confirms the active runtime publication bundle and parity verdict still align.

probeCatalog.label: Preview browser regression
probeCatalog.description: Exercises the preview browser shell against the published tuple.

probeCatalog.label: Preview callback replay
probeCatalog.description: Checks continuity-sensitive callback and replay evidence before widen or resume.

probeCatalog.label: Preview parity refresh
probeCatalog.description: Re-validates parity for the preview tuple.

probeCatalog.label: Integration browser end-to-end
probeCatalog.description: Exercises one critical integration path on the currently published tuple.

probeCatalog.label: Integration callback replay
probeCatalog.description: Checks replay-safe callback continuity before any wave step advances.

probeCatalog.label: Integration projection freshness
probeCatalog.description: Confirms the read-path posture remains converged for the current route family set.

probeCatalog.label: Preprod security suite
probeCatalog.description: Executes the high-signal preprod security and smoke suite for the active tuple.

probeCatalog.label: Preprod readiness snapshot
probeCatalog.description: Checks the current readiness snapshot placeholder and recovery posture binding.

probeCatalog.label: Preprod parity refresh
probeCatalog.description: Re-validates preprod publication parity against the active tuple.

probeCatalog.label: Shared provenance verification
probeCatalog.description: Checks build provenance state for the bound runtime publication bundle.

probeCatalog.label: Shared assurance slice trust
probeCatalog.description: Checks the required assurance slices and live trust freeze posture for the tuple.
